description: Phase 5: Consolidated cleanup recommendations — combines findings from phases 1-4 + specific rules to produce an actionable list of files to archive, delete, or review.

cleanup_rules.description: For each duplicate group, keep the most recent, mark others as CLEANUP_CANDIDATE
Files with size=0 — safe to delete
Files with 'tmp', 'draft', 'copia de', 'copy of' in name and last_modified > 6 months old
Files whose category doesn't match the area convention (e.g. image in Área_Contabilidad)

steps.note: AGENT: For each rule, execute the corresponding SQL/query via graph_nodes_list filters + post-process. Accumulate findings into a structured list.
For empty-files filter + draft pattern filter

args.name: audit/{{inputs.audit_date}}/05-cleanup
args.content: <AGENT-GENERATED: sections per rule, each with a markdown table of candidates including web_url for manual review>
